bodyHtml:
Recent operator-action digest

Window: last 5 day(s) · scope=qa-manager (editorial — sees all) Items: 12 · Forecasts emitted: 29 · Positions opened: 0

Each item below was extracted by the operator from a recent editor / QA / quality review, routed to an analyst, and either completed or is mid-flight. Use this to - avoid re-asking questions another analyst already investigated - pick up contradictions noted by the editor and resolved by a peer - weight your own conclusions against fresh forecast evidence

2026-06-23 · [fact_correction] 厘清电子板块融资余额统计口径差异

DONE

Clarify the difference between 5608亿元 and 6.132.72亿元 to update to the latest rolling value as per Section 2.2.

  • Outcome: research:电子板块融资余额 → failed | error: upstream status: failed

Provide underlying sources, collection time, and calculation logic for the 4-8 month, 14.5bn, 3.8bn, and 15%-22% figures. Source: 需要协作的事项

  • Outcome: research discussion "Supplement shipbuilding/offshore risk sources" → failed | cards=5 | error: # Your Role: 主题研究员 (Thematic Researcher) | → 1 forecast(s) on DSIC, 0 position(s) opened

Confirm if China 10Y breaks 1.73% and the 1.74%-1.85% defense line. Source: 需要协作的事项

跟踪中国 10Y 国债 1.73% 是否跌破 memory 中关注的 1.74%-1.85% 防线 [来源：chief-economist memory 2026-06-22]

2026-06-23 · [research_task] Confirm CEA free quota policy

DONE · owner=policy-analyst

Confirm if "2026 low probability, 2027–2028 pilot, 2030 free+paid pattern" holds and unify 99.5% vs 100% denominator. Source: 需要协作的事项

  • Outcome: research:CEA → completed | dir=sessions/30fdf3cd-adff-4074-94f7-3b6b9249dede | summary: CEA 的法定英文名称为 China Eastern Airlines Corporation Limited，于 1995-04-14 在中华人民共和国注册成立，总部位于上海市闵行区虹翔三路 36 号，注册地址位于上海市浦东新区浦东国际机场机场大道 66 号[S1]。公司是中国三大国有骨干航空公司之一，截至 2025 年报发布日，航空网络覆盖 945 个目的地、145 个国家和地区[S1]。 | → 1 forecast(s) on CEA, 0 position(s) opened

  • Forecasts: 1 (0 positions); tickers: CEA

2026-06-23 · [research_task] Evaluate credit risk from shipbuilding delays

DONE · owner=credit-analyst · research discussion=Evaluate credit risk from shipbuilding delays (led by credit-analyst)

Evaluate if 4-8 month delays in Qingdao base lead to bad debt risks for bank leasing subsidiaries (Section 2.3).

  • Outcome: research discussion "Evaluate credit risk from shipbuilding delays" → completed | cards=10 | last-card: 截至2026-06-23，本报告对前序链条做压力测试：313.42亿元电力设备与地方能源基建需求收缩不足以单独压制Hyperscaler AI Capex总量，但会在变压器、变电站、开关柜和接网工程紧张地区推迟AI数据中心送电。基准判断是Capex不会消失，而是从GPU和土建转向电力权利、接网保证金、表后电源和提前锁定重电设备。若213.39亿元地方能源基建收缩与AI枢纽重合并递延6,096.86 MW电力能力，则按1.44 PUE可能递延约4.23 GW IT负荷送电。 | → 1 forecast(s) on LFSS, …

  • Forecasts: 1 (0 positions); tickers: LFSS

2026-06-23 · [research_task] Verify shipbuilding/offshore chain tags

DONE · owner=sentiment-analyst · research discussion=Verify shipbuilding/offshore chain tags (led by sentiment-analyst)

Verify chain_tags_ctd_mqopixjq_bqwc7te8.json and underlying evidence for shipyard utilization and revenue delay figures before publication (from Morning Confirmed Facts And Data).

  • Outcome: research discussion "Verify shipbuilding/offshore chain tags" → completed | cards=10 | last-card: 本报告（最终研究）以 prior research notes的 −7.1% 展期收益、9.36% 商品拖累为既定输入，回答如何重平衡商品、黄金、债券以维持风险平价。核心：9.36% 拖累是预期收益问题，而风险平价对收益失明，机械沿用旧权重会持续为负 carry 能源 beta 供血（陷阱）；但摧毁商品 carry 的同一场 2027 实物过剩（500 万桶/日、Brent 79 美元）是通缩性、利多久期，并重新武装股债负相关（礼物）。据此重构：商品 25%→14%（腰斩能源 beta）、黄金 10%→17%、名义久期 35%→42%、TIPS 10%→7%、股票不…

  • Forecasts: 11 (0 positions); tickers: BCOM, STEO, IEA, BERY

2026-06-23 · [research_task] 确认碳配额政策口径一致性

DONE · owner=policy-analyst · research discussion=确认碳配额政策口径一致性 (led by policy-analyst)

请在下午若有新文件更新时确认碳配额“2026 低概率、2027–2028 试点、2030 免费+有偿格局”的表述是否仍成立。

  • Outcome: research discussion "确认碳配额政策口径一致性" → completed | cards=10 | last-card: 本报告作为十卡研究线的收口综合，把整条AI–电力–碳链条落到多资产组合：超配电网/变压器稀缺（模型35%），对资本开支高效芯片与已送电租赁方做标配杠铃（25%）并低配循环融资sell-in与延误低上架率站点，选择性超配具真实交易能力的绿电（20%），小幅结构性CEA多头（10%），持有10%久期/现金凸性储备。两大对冲：用‘做多瓶颈/低配sell-in’配对对冲sell-in vs sell-through缺口；用持有瓶颈（做多延误）、低配债务驱动过度建设、并以低相关碳/绿电压舱石对冲搁浅资本开支尾部。OpenAI约1.15万亿美元跨七供应商分配、逾800… | → 2 forecast(s…

  • Forecasts: 2 (0 positions); tickers: TPU, IFRS

2026-06-23 · [research_task] 监控科创50站稳情况及 LFVN 流动性信号

DONE

盘中监控科创50 30 分钟是否站稳 1620 及 CPO/半导体成交量变化，同时关注 LFVN 是否触发右侧流动性枯竭信号。

  • Outcome: SLA: in_progress > 14d, linked artifact never reached terminal — force-closed

2026-06-23 · [research_task] Assess renewable energy curtailment impacts

DONE · owner=utilities-analyst · research discussion=Assess renewable energy curtailment impacts (led by utilities-analyst)

Evaluate if grid connection delays and transformer shortages lead to higher curtailment rates and ROIC dilution (Section 2.4).

  • Outcome: research discussion "Assess renewable energy curtailment impacts" → completed | cards=9 | last-card: 截至2026-06-23，本报告片量化压力测试了USD/CNH看涨价差期权对冲离岸CNH流动性风险的传导有效性。在央行防守导致即期信号截断（极端压力下由理论7.65基本面截断至7.28，产生3,700 pips偏差）下，流动性压力溢出至利率和期权空间。隔夜及3M HIBOR暴涨至15.00%和8.50%，1Y swap basis拓宽至-72.50 bp，驱动A股CSI 300 ERP上升140 bp并使防守杠铃Beta由0.19飙升至0.35（贡献12%回撤中的5.6个百分点）。配置1M 7.25/7.45 USD/CNH看涨价差…

  • Forecasts: 13 (0 positions); tickers: GE, BTM, SOFR, MOVE, CCUS, RBC

2026-06-23 · [research_task] 评估白酒价格波动对防御性红利资产的影响

IN_PROGRESS · owner=asset-allocator

若下午渠道摸底证实五粮液普五价格已跌破 800 元并触发经销商现金流倒挂，请重估白酒板块作为防御性高股息底仓的有效性。
